summary: Solid soundboard recording of a sweet first set (Iko Iko) and strong Terrapin/Black Peter, with a praised drums‑space segment.
review: The reviewer’s first experience with this show was positive – the opening “Iko Iko” set a sweet tone, and highlights like “Terrapin Station” and “Black Peter” were especially enjoyed. The drum and space improvisation earned special praise, and the soundboard source is described as clear and pleasant, making it a worthwhile addition to a collection.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it rates the show 4 stars and mentions good performance and decent sound quality; thus a solid rating around 4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the recording is "quite kind" (i.e., clear and pleasant) with no major issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as sweet; drums/space segment highlighted as a strong, enjoyable part of the show.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drums and space improvisation were specifically praised by the reviewer.
